calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2024 Continued To May-29-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion And Notice Of Hearing For Prove Up Hearing (Motions)
Off Calendar Apr-10-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for a request for judgment by default against Defendant Cameron Naji Carter.

Dept: 505: Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes: Proceedings recorded by "for the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 9:23:53 a.m. and concluding at 9:32:33 a.m.(D505)

Lino V. Martire, Esq. representing Plaintiff Side Financial Services, LLC.
Defendant Cameron Naji Carter not appearing.
Witness Mark Archuleta sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.

Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract, Common Counts, Equitable Lien, Conversion, and Breach of Fiduciary Duties filed Jul-26-2023.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant Cameron Naji Carter on Aug-04-2023.
Default entered as to Defendant Cameron Naji Carter on Feb-06-2024.
Dismissal filed against Defendants Does 1 through 20, inclusive on Nov-08-2023.

Counsel summarizes the content of the compliant and offers proof as to witness testimony.

Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the Court's review:
Exhibit A: Listing Agreement between Defendant Carter and Mosaik Real Estate
Exhibit B: Concierge Agreement between Plaintiff and Defendant Carter.
Exhibit D: Proof of service.
Exhibit E: Entry of Default against Defendant Carter.

Mark Archuleta is called to testify.
The Court examines the witness, Mark Archuleta.
Mark Archuleta confirms that Counsel's statements are true and correct.

The Court reviews the proposed judgment.
Counsel requests that the interest be modified to reflect the duration until today's date.
The Court grants the request and modifies the interest.

After reviewing the declarations, hearing the statements and testimonies, the Court rules infavor of the plaintiff and against the defendant as follows:

The Plaintiff is to recover from the Defendant the following:
Damages $69,000.00
Interest $8,240.48
Attorney's Fees $12,906.00
Costs $1,056.08
Total Judgment $91,202.56

Proposed judgment as modified is signed and executed by the Court this day.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2023 Continued To Apr-24-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
